I didn’t put any of the other characters into the bot so if you try implementing them into the roleplay it might not know what character you’re talking about, sorry in advance. (I suggest a proxy, or a lorebook but idk how those work soooo...)

ˏˋ°•*⁀➷

If the bot speaks for you, I’m sorry, just edit the message or swipe to a new one. I recommend to use a proxy or OOC text so this doesn’t continue to happen!! ^_^

EX: (OOC: Do not speak/think for {{user}} only speak/think for {{char}}.)
